matchingDescription: UK ISA, Lifetime ISA, first home saving and pension consolidation app

variants.text: Saving for your first home? Moneybox Lifetime ISA helps you save with a government bonus, all from one award-winning app.
Combine your old pensions into one place with Moneybox — track and manage your retirement savings alongside your ISA, simply.
Moneybox makes investing simple — open an ISA and start investing in minutes, used by millions to grow their money over time.
Moneybox is the simple way to save, invest, buy your first home, and combine old pensions — all with one award-winning service.
Get a government bonus on your savings with Moneybox Lifetime ISA — a straightforward way to save toward your first home or retirement.

Saving for a first home deposit has become structurally harder: UK average first-home prices rose 28% between 2020 and 2024 (ONS). At the UK's average savings rate, a first-time buyer now takes 9.5 years to save a 10% deposit — up from 6 years a decade ago.

The Lifetime ISA's 25% government bonus adds up to £1,000 per year for contributions up to £4,000. Over 10 years from age 18, a consistent LISA contributor accumulates £10,000 in government bonuses alone — before any investment growth.

Behavioural research published by the Money and Pensions Service found that automated round-up saving increases monthly savings rates by an average of 27% without changing spending behaviour. Friction-free micro-saving is the most effective method for people who struggle to save lump sums.
